MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by John Ryan.
Attorney, Daniel Cheung is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Bryan Hanson is present.
Attorney, Kimberly Shindel (ALRP) is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of December 23, 2013 is vacated.
